meaning: adj.[律] 非绝对的,非最后的
examples: The period between the decree nisi and the decree absolute was six weeks.
His trial practice, at nisi prius and in the appellate courts, was very large.
The decree is nisi and not absolute.
Mr Cavener said Rachel began divorce proceedings the following March, with a decree nisi granted on 13 June 2012 - eight days after the Vegas wedding.
Ut nisi sem, vehicula in, malesuada id, congue eget, leo.
